body.title: Igor walk batch 21: next code quality sweep
body.result: 2 fixes: stale cert TODO removed from pe_chain.py; hardcoded Igor-wild-0001 in response_habituation.py docstring fixed
body.description:
Continuation of the cc-walk series (walks 14-20 done on 2026-05-08). Run day-close-audit code smell scan + dead code + orphan checks on wild_igor/igor/, triage findings, fix small issues inline. Each distinct fix gets its own sub-ticket or is committed with a clear scope note.

Previous walks: 14=refractory window, 15=dead webhook branch, 16=fcntl lock, 17=shim retirements (127 files), 18=scan_ebooks path, 19=DRM sentinel, 20=NE stew-salience guard.

**Affected files:** TBD — discovery step in sprint. Scope: wild_igor/igor/ code smell and dead code findings.
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** In scope: scan + fix findings from audit steps 3, 10, 11 (smells, orphans, duplication). Out of scope: architecture changes, new features, HIGH-inertia file restructuring without pre-approval.
**Test plan:** All TheIgors tests pass after each fix; no new tests unless a fix adds a behaviour worth testing.
